items.title: Organic Maps
items.author: tosh
items.summary_zh: Organic Maps是一款完全开源且离线可用的地图应用，基于OpenStreetMap数据构建。它没有任何跟踪或广告，专注于用户隐私和极简体验，支持导航、地点搜索和骑行路线规划。对于经常旅行、担心隐私泄露或身处网络信号不佳地区的人来说，这款应用提供了一个自由而可靠的地图选择，堪称Google Maps的理想替代品。
items.summary_en: Organic Maps is a fully open-source, offline map app built on OpenStreetMap data. It offers navigation, place search, and cycling routes without any tracking or ads, prioritizing user privacy and simplicity. Ideal for travelers, privacy-conscious users, or those in areas with poor connectivity, it serves as a reliable and ethical alternative to Google Maps, giving people full control over their location data.

items.title: OpenPrinter
items.author: bouh
items.summary_zh: OpenPrinter是一个旨在开放打印机生态系统的开源项目，它通过提供标准化的通信协议和驱动框架，让用户能够摆脱厂商锁定的限制。该项目解决了打印机与操作系统不兼容、驱动难找等常见痛点，特别适合那些希望自由选择设备和系统的IT管理员或极客用户。其核心价值在于将打印机控制权交还给用户，推动硬件互操作性。
items.summary_en: OpenPrinter is an open-source initiative to liberate the printer ecosystem by providing standardized communication protocols and a driver framework, breaking vendor lock-in. It tackles common frustrations like incompatible drivers and OS restrictions, making it ideal for IT administrators and power users who want to manage printers freely across different systems. By democratizing printer control, the project promotes hardware interoperability and reduces e-waste, giving users the flexibility to choose their devices and operating systems without artificial limitations.

items.title: Command and Conquer Generals natively ported to macOS, iPhone, iPad using Fable
items.author: asronline
items.summary_zh: 经典即时战略游戏《命令与征服：将军》借助Fable工具被原生移植到macOS、iPhone和iPad平台。这意味着玩家无需通过模拟器或虚拟机，就能在苹果设备上直接流畅运行这款老游戏。对于怀念这款作品的军事策略爱好者来说，这次移植不仅提升了操作的便捷性，还充分利用了苹果硬件的性能，让移动端也能体验完整的战场指挥。
items.summary_en: Command and Conquer Generals has been natively ported to macOS, iPhone, and iPad using the Fable tool, allowing players to run the classic real-time strategy game without emulation or virtualization. This matters because it brings a beloved PC title to Apple platforms with full hardware acceleration and touch-friendly controls, appealing to nostalgic gamers who want to command armies on the go. The port demonstrates how modern tooling can breathe new life into legacy software, making it accessible to a wider audience while preserving the original gameplay experience.

items.title: It's not about physical vs. digital games, it's about ownership
items.author: popcar2
items.summary_zh: 一个热门讨论指出，游戏行业的核心问题不在于实体版与数字版之争，而在于玩家是否真正拥有自己购买的软件。当数字商店可以随时下架游戏或撤销授权，玩家实际上只获得了有限的租用权。这一话题引发了关于消费者权益、数字版权保护和长期保存的深思。
items.summary_en: A heated discussion on Hacker News argues that the real issue in gaming isn't physical versus digital copies, but whether players truly own what they buy. When digital storefronts can revoke access or delist titles at will, consumers effectively only rent their games. This sparks reflection on consumer rights, digital ownership, and the long-term preservation of software, urging both the industry and regulators to rethink what 'buying' means in the digital age.

items.title: If you're a button, you have one job
items.author: nozzlegear
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于用户界面设计的文章以“按钮只有一个任务”为论点，批评了现代软件中过度复杂和模糊的设计倾向。它强调每个交互元素应当有明确且单一的功能，避免让用户猜测或误操作。对于产品设计师和前端开发者而言，这篇文章提醒他们在追求美观的同时不能牺牲可用性——好的按钮应该让用户一看就知道按下去会发生什么，这也是以人为本的设计基本原则。
items.summary_en: A design philosophy essay argues that a button has exactly one job: triggering a single, clear action. It criticizes modern interfaces that overload buttons with multiple functions or unclear labels, leading to user confusion and errors. The article is a timely reminder for product designers and front-end developers that simplicity and discoverability are paramount in interaction design. By adhering to the principle of one purpose per element, teams can create more intuitive software that respects users' attention and reduces cognitive load, ultimately leading to higher satisfaction and fewer support issues.

items.title: Resetting Xbox
items.author: dijksterhuis
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于重置Xbox的技术帖引发了社区关注，内容涉及如何彻底恢复主机以便重新使用或出售。讨论涵盖了系统还原、账户解绑和数据清除等实用步骤，同时也提醒用户注意操作风险。对于想要转手或修复Xbox的玩家来说，这无疑是一份实用的指南。
items.summary_en: A technical discussion titled 'Resetting Xbox' has drawn attention on Hacker News, detailing how to fully restore a console for reuse or resale. The thread covers system recovery, account unlinking, and data wiping, along with warnings about potential pitfalls. This serves as a practical guide for gamers looking to sell or repair their Xbox, emphasizing the importance of secure erasure and proper setup to avoid lingering personal data or account issues.

items.title: OpenWrt One – Open Hardware Router
items.author: peter_d_sherman
items.summary_zh: OpenWrt 团队发布了其首款官方开源硬件路由器，名为 OpenWrt One。这款设备旨在为高级用户和开发者提供完全开放的控制权，从启动加载器到系统软件均可自由定制。它不仅适用于网络调试和实验，也为那些希望摆脱闭源固件束缚的用户打开了新大门。
items.summary_en: The OpenWrt project has unveiled its first official open hardware router, aptly named OpenWrt One. Designed for power users and developers, the device provides complete control from bootloader to system software, enabling deep customization and experimentation. It offers a compelling alternative to locked-down consumer routers, appealing to network enthusiasts, security researchers, and anyone who values full ownership of their networking hardware. This launch marks a milestone in open-source networking.

items.title: Explanation of everything you can see in htop/top on Linux (2019)
items.author: theanonymousone
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章详细解释了 Linux 下 htop 和 top 工具中每个字段的含义，包括 CPU、内存、进程状态等。它适合那些想深入了解系统性能监控细节的开发者和运维人员，帮你读懂那些看似复杂的数字和指标，从而更精准地排查问题。
items.summary_en: This article from 2019 provides a thorough explanation of every field you see in htop and top on Linux, from CPU percentages to memory usage and process states. It's a must-read for developers and sysadmins who want to truly understand system monitoring output rather than just guess at the numbers. By breaking down each column and indicator, the author turns an opaque terminal display into a clear diagnostic tool, helping you spot bottlenecks and runaway processes with confidence.

items.title: EU Council forces Chat Control via fast-track
items.author: stavros
items.summary_zh: 欧盟理事会正以快速通道程序推动“聊天控制”立法，要求通讯平台扫描用户私聊内容以检测非法材料。这引发了巨大的隐私争议，批评者认为它破坏了端到端加密，并可能被滥用。该提案因快速推进而让数字权利组织深感忧虑。
items.summary_en: The EU Council is fast-tracking the so-called ‘Chat Control’ law, which would force messaging platforms to scan private conversations for illegal content. While the stated goal is to combat child abuse material, critics argue the measure undermines end-to-end encryption and creates a mass surveillance infrastructure. The accelerated legislative process has alarmed digital rights groups, who warn that such broad scanning powers could be easily expanded and abused, threatening the privacy of all EU citizens.

items.title: Has_not_been_viewed_much
items.author: wxw
items.summary_zh: 这篇 Hacker News 上的文章探讨了那些“没被看多少”的内容——即平台算法极少推荐、鲜有人点击的帖子。它反思了当前内容分发机制对冷门内容的忽视，并邀请读者思考这种选择性可见性对知识多样性带来的影响。
items.summary_en: This Hacker News story takes a curious look at content that ‘has not been viewed much’ — posts and articles that the algorithm barely surfaces and few people ever click on. It’s a thoughtful reflection on how modern feed and recommendation systems prioritize popular items while leaving a long tail of interesting work invisible. The discussion matters for anyone concerned about the diversity of ideas online, reminding us that what we don't see may be just as important as what we do.

items.title: CoMaps – FOSS Offline Maps
items.author: basilikum
items.summary_zh: CoMaps 是一款自由开源的离线地图应用，专注于隐私保护和离线使用场景。它允许用户下载地图数据后在完全没有网络连接的情况下查看路线和地点信息，所有数据都存储在本地，不依赖任何云端服务。对于经常在偏远地区旅行、担心隐私泄露或希望避免流量费用的用户来说，CoMaps 提供了一种安全可靠的地图解决方案。它的设计理念是让地图真正为用户所有，而不是被第三方追踪。
items.summary_en: CoMaps is a free and open-source offline maps application that prioritizes privacy and offline usage. It lets users download map data and then browse routes and locations without any internet connection, storing everything locally and relying on no cloud services. This makes it ideal for travelers in remote areas, privacy-conscious users, or anyone looking to avoid data charges. CoMaps embodies the principle that maps should be owned by the user, not tracked by third parties.

items.title: Fable turned reMarkable into Tom Riddle's diary from Harry Potter
items.author: modinfo
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者将 reMarkable 电子墨水平板改造成了哈利波特中汤姆·里德尔的日记，通过一个名为 Fable 的项目实现了互动效果。这个改装让平板屏幕能够模拟出日记本页面，并响应触摸或手写输入，重现了电影中那种神秘而有趣的交互体验。这个项目展示了 e-ink 设备在创意改造方面的潜力，对于哈利波特粉丝和喜欢玩硬件的极客来说，是一个既怀旧又充满技术趣味的作品。
items.summary_en: A developer has turned the reMarkable e-ink tablet into Tom Riddle's diary from Harry Potter using a project called Fable. The mod makes the tablet's screen simulate the diary pages, responding to touch and handwriting inputs to recreate the mysterious, playful interaction from the films. This project showcases the creative potential of e-ink devices for custom hacks. For Harry Potter fans and hardware tinkerers, it is a nostalgic and technically delightful piece that blends magic with modern gadgetry.

items.title: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: 这个GitHub仓库公开了从Anthropic和OpenAI等AI公司模型中提取的系统提示（system prompts），包括Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking等版本。这些提示揭示了模型背后的一些行为规则和设计逻辑，对AI研究者和开发者理解模型内部机制、进行提示工程非常有价值，但也引发了关于安全和隐私的讨论。
items.summary_en: This repository contains extracted system prompts from major AI models including Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, and OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. These leaked prompts provide rare insight into how these models are instructed to behave, revealing design logic and safety rules. For AI researchers and prompt engineers, this is a goldmine for understanding and improving prompt techniques. However, it also raises concerns about intellectual property and security, as companies typically keep such system prompts confidential.

items.title: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.author: addyosmani
items.summary_zh: agent-skills 是 Google Chrome 团队 Addy Osmani 发起的开源项目，旨在为AI编码代理注入生产级的工程技能。项目提供了一套精心设计的技能库，涵盖代码审查、调试、测试生成、性能优化、安全审计等专业领域。每个技能以清晰的提示（prompt）和示例形式呈现，使AI代理能像资深工程师一样思考和工作。该项目的重要性在于填补了当前AI编码助手的核心短板——多数工具只能生成代码片段，但缺乏对代码质量、可维护性和工程规范的深层次理解。受益对象是所有使用AI辅助编程的开发者，尤其是团队中的高级工程师和架构师。GitHub趋势榜上的高关注度反映了开发者对“更有用AI代理”的迫切需求。项目本身是纯文本/知识库形式，依赖LLM本身的推理能力，不绑定特定平台，因此极易集成到Cline、GitHub Copilot等工具中。
items.summary_en: Agent-skills is an open-source project by Google Chrome's Addy Osmani that equips AI coding agents with production-grade engineering competencies. It provides a curated library of skills—code review, debugging, test generation, performance optimization, and security auditing—each packaged as well-crafted prompts with real-world examples. The project addresses a critical gap in current AI coding assistants: most can generate code but lack deep understanding of quality, maintainability, and engineering best practices. Senior developers, teams adopting AI-assisted workflows, and tool builders benefit directly from these reusable skill definitions. Its rapid rise on GitHub signals urgent demand for more capable, context-aware AI agents. The project is platform-agnostic (pure text/prompt libraries) and integrates easily with agents like Cline, Claude Code, or Copilot. By codifying expert knowledge into prompt templates, it pushes AI coding from toy examples toward production readiness.

items.summary_en: Firecrawl is a powerful web API that enables developers to search, scrape, and interact with websites at scale. Data scientists, AI training teams, and application developers can use it to accelerate product iteration and research by extracting valuable information from massive web pages with ease. This tool lowers the barrier for web data acquisition, making it easier for intelligent applications to leverage real-time web content.

items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

items.summary_en: OpenMontage is the world's first open-source, agentic video production system, featuring 12 pipelines, 52 tools, and over 500 agent skills. It transforms your AI coding assistant into a full-fledged video production studio, automating tasks like scriptwriting, editing, voiceover, and effects. This solves the complexity and high cost of traditional video creation, enabling anyone to produce professional videos using natural language commands. Content creators, marketers, and developers benefit from a streamlined workflow that eliminates the need for specialized hardware or teams. It's a game-changer for democratizing video production, making it as simple as talking to an AI.

items.summary_en: Agent-Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI agents the ability to 'see' the entire internet. It enables reading and searching across major platforms like Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu — all without any API fees. The biggest pain point for AI agent developers is getting real-time, cross-platform data; Agent-Reach solves this with a single command. Whether you're building a social media analyzer, a tech trend tracker, or a content aggregator, you can now equip your AI with 'eyes' at zero cost. It's a game-changer for hobbyists and startups who previously had to rely on expensive or rate-limited APIs.

items.summary_en: iptv-org/iptv is a community-maintained collection of freely available IPTV channels from around the world. It aggregates thousands of live TV streams into a single, structured playlist, making it easy to explore international TV content without expensive subscriptions. This open-source project solves the headache of finding reliable, free IPTV sources by keeping the list constantly updated. Anyone interested in global TV content—from expats to cord-cutters—can benefit by simply loading the playlist into any compatible player.

items.author: asgeirtj
items.summary_zh: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks 是一个 GitHub 项目，它收集了 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 多个大模型的系统提示词，包括 Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking 等。这些提示词揭示了模型背后如何被引导、如何设定角色和限制，对 AI 研究者和开发者理解模型行为非常有价值。它引发了关于提示工程和模型安全边界的讨论，也是窥探顶级 AI 内部设计的一个窗口。
items.summary_en: This GitHub repository compiles leaked system prompts from popular AI models like Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Opus 4.8, as well as OpenAI's ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking and GPT 5.5 Instant. By exposing the hidden instructions that shape how these models behave, it offers rare insight into prompt engineering, safety guardrails, and role-setting techniques. AI researchers and developers can learn how top models are orchestrated, but the leak also raises important questions about access control and intellectual property in the generative AI race.

items.summary_en: Strix is an open-source AI-powered penetration testing tool designed to automatically identify and fix vulnerabilities in applications. By simulating cyber attacks with artificial intelligence, it helps developers catch security flaws early in the development cycle, significantly reducing manual effort and cost. This tool is particularly valuable for startups and individual developers who lack dedicated security teams, offering a practical way to strengthen app security without complex infrastructure. Its open-source nature also allows the community to contribute and customize it for specific needs.

It offers components for data annotation, model evaluation, visualization, and integration with popular frameworks like YOLO and SAM. The project solves the problem of reinventing common CV workflows, allowing developers to quickly assemble pipelines from training to production. It's a time saver for computer vision engineers and researchers who want to focus on their specific models rather than boilerplate code.

items.title: AnySearch
items.description: Real-time structured search trusted by agents and developers
items.summary_zh: AnySearch 是一款实时结构化搜索工具，专为 AI 智能体和开发者打造。它能够快速从海量数据中提取出有意义的结构化结果，而不是简单的文本匹配。对于构建数据驱动应用或需要可靠实时搜索能力的团队来说，这能大幅提升效率和数据准确性。
items.summary_en: AnySearch is a real-time structured search engine that both AI agents and human developers can trust. Instead of returning messy text snippets, it delivers clean, structured data on the fly, which is crucial for building reliable automated workflows or querying large datasets. For any team that needs fast, accurate lookups — especially when powering AI assistants or analytics dashboards — AnySearch eliminates the overhead of parsing and normalizing search results.

items.title: Typeahead 2.0
items.description: Private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
items.summary_zh: Typeahead 2.0 是一款面向 Mac 用户的隐私优先 AI 自动补全工具，能在任何应用中帮你快速完成句子或代码片段。它运行在本地，不会将输入数据发送到云端，因此既安全又快速。对文字工作者、程序员或经常填表的用户来说，这能显著减少重复打字。
items.summary_en: Typeahead 2.0 brings private AI-powered autocomplete to every app on your Mac. Unlike cloud-based suggestions, it runs entirely on your machine, meaning your keystrokes never leave your device. It predicts and completes sentences, code, or form entries as you type, saving time and reducing typos. For writers, developers, or anyone who does a lot of text input, this is a privacy-conscious productivity boost that works seamlessly across the entire operating system, not just within a single app.

items.title: Octolens
items.description: Social listening for the agent era
items.summary_zh: Octolens是一款专为智能体时代设计的社交媒体监听工具。它能够实时追踪AI代理和人类在社交平台上的对话，帮助品牌了解自身被AI模型如何提及和解读。在AI生成内容愈发普及的今天，传统的舆情监听已无法覆盖AI对话中的品牌声量，Octolens填补了这一空白。市场营销人员、公关团队和产品经理可以通过它洞察AI推荐逻辑对品牌的影响，从而更精准地制定传播策略。这款工具的关键价值在于让企业听见AI时代“无声”的舆论。
items.summary_en: Octolens is a social listening tool built specifically for the age of AI agents. It monitors how brands are mentioned and perceived not only by humans but also by AI models, filling a critical gap in traditional sentiment analysis. As AI-generated content becomes more prevalent, companies can no longer rely solely on human conversations for brand intelligence. Octolens tracks discussions across social platforms where both users and AI bots interact, enabling marketing teams to understand how algorithms influence brand perception. Its real-time alerts and AI-aware insights help businesses adjust their strategies proactively. Marketers, PR professionals, and product managers who need to keep a finger on the pulse of both human and machine-driven brand mentions will find Octolens indispensable.

items.title: Sunrise
items.description: A real planner for Google Tasks

items.title: AirKaren
items.description: AI that fights customer service for you

items.title: WorkBuddy
items.description: Produce sharpened results faster with a team of AI experts
items.summary_zh: WorkBuddy是一个汇聚了多位AI专家的智能协作平台，用户可以与这些AI助手自然对话，快速获得专业分析和优化建议。它适合需要快速迭代创意或解决复杂问题的团队，相当于拥有一支永不疲倦的专家团队，能显著缩短从想法到成果的周期。无论是产品设计、营销策略还是技术开发，WorkBuddy都能提供精准的辅助，大幅提升工作效率。
items.summary_en: WorkBuddy is a collaborative platform that brings together a team of specialized AI experts, each trained in different domains. You can chat with them naturally to receive sharpened insights and faster results. It is ideal for teams that need to iterate on ideas quickly or tackle complex problems, effectively providing an always-on, tireless panel of specialists. By leveraging multiple AI perspectives simultaneously, WorkBuddy dramatically reduces the time from initial concept to polished output, making it a powerful productivity booster for product design, marketing, and technical development.

items.title: DocsAlot
items.description: Documentation that works for both humans and AI systems
items.summary_zh: DocsAlot是一款智能文档工具，能够同时生成人类可读和AI可解析的内容，解决了传统文档要么只适合人看、要么只适合机器读的痛点。开发者可以用它快速编写API文档、产品说明和技术指南，确保团队成员和AI系统都能准确理解。对于正在构建AI功能或维护知识库的团队来说，DocsAlot是一个不可或缺的桥梁工具，让文档在不同受众之间无缝流转。
items.summary_en: DocsAlot is a documentation tool that produces content optimized for both human readers and AI systems. It solves the common problem where documentation is either too technical for people or too vague for machines. Developers can quickly create API docs, product manuals, and technical guides that are clear for humans and structured for AI parsing. This makes it invaluable for teams building AI-powered features or maintaining knowledge bases where both people and bots need reliable information. DocsAlot acts as a bridge, ensuring seamless communication across different audiences.

items.title: Endl
items.description: A global operating account for fiat, stablecoins, and cards.
items.summary_zh: Endl是一个全球运营账户，同时支持法币、稳定币和银行卡支付，让用户在一个地方管理多币种资金。它特别适合跨境企业、自由职业者和加密货币从业者，彻底告别多个银行账户的繁琐。无论你是接收美元工资、支付供应商款项还是日常消费，Endl都能简化国际收支和货币兑换流程，尤其利好需要兼顾法定货币与数字资产的用户，真正实现全球化资金管理。
items.summary_en: Endl is a global operating account that seamlessly combines fiat currencies, stablecoins, and card payments in one place. It is designed for businesses, freelancers, and crypto users who deal with international transactions, eliminating the need to juggle multiple bank accounts. With Endl, you can hold, send, and spend both traditional money and digital stablecoins, making cross-border payments and currency exchange much more efficient. It is particularly useful for crypto-native companies that still need to interact with the traditional financial system, offering true global fund management.

items.title: TryCase
items.description: Disposable test environments for AI coding agents

items.title: MentionDrop MCP
items.description: Give your AI agent live market signals

items.title: Vida
items.description: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask
items.summary_zh: Vida 是一款创新的 AI 工具，口号是“克隆自己，让 AI 在你提问之前就完成工作”。它通过分析用户的行为模式和偏好，自动生成一个能够代替你处理日常任务的数字分身。比如自动回复邮件、整理信息或安排日程，从而大幅节省时间。对于忙碌的职场人士或自由职业者来说，Vida 就像一个全天候工作的虚拟助理，让重复性劳动变得自动化，让你能专注于真正重要的事情。
items.summary_en: Vida is an AI tool that lets you clone yourself so it can handle tasks before you even ask. By learning your behavior patterns and preferences, it creates a digital twin that autonomously manages routine work like replying to emails, organizing information, and scheduling. For busy professionals and freelancers, Vida acts as a proactive virtual assistant that eliminates repetitive chores, freeing up mental energy for creative and strategic work. It’s essentially a personal AI that anticipates your needs and acts on them immediately.

items.title: ChecklistFox
items.description: AI checklist maker for beautiful pdfs, free & instant
items.summary_zh: ChecklistFox 是一款免费的 AI 清单制作工具，可以瞬间生成美观的 PDF 文档。你只需输入任务或主题，它就能自动帮你整理出结构清晰的清单列表，并排版成可直接打印或分享的专业 PDF。无论是旅行打包清单、项目管理核对表还是婚礼筹备事项，ChecklistFox 都能在几秒钟内搞定。它的最大优势是免费且即时，无需注册，打开即用，非常适合需要快速整理思路且追求输出格式美观的用户。
items.summary_en: ChecklistFox is a free AI-powered checklist maker that instantly generates beautiful PDFs. Simply describe your task or topic, and it automatically organizes the content into a well-structured checklist, formatted as a professional PDF ready for printing or sharing. Whether it’s a travel packing list, project milestones, or wedding planning, ChecklistFox delivers in seconds. The best part is it’s completely free, requires no sign-up, and works instantly—ideal for anyone who needs to quickly organize thoughts and present them in a clean, shareable document.

items.title: PhoneDeck
items.description: Turn your iPhone into a free Mac controller
items.summary_zh: PhoneDeck能将你的iPhone瞬间变成Mac的无线控制器，完全免费，无需额外硬件。它支持触控板、键盘快捷键、媒体播放等多种控制模式，非常适合在演示时控制电脑、远程桌面操作或窝在沙发上浏览。只需在iPhone和Mac上安装相应应用即可配对使用，比购买专用遥控器或触控板方便得多。对于经常随身携带iPhone的Mac用户，PhoneDeck是一个巧妙且经济的替代方案。
items.summary_en: PhoneDeck turns your iPhone into a free, wireless controller for your Mac, requiring no extra hardware. It supports multiple control modes including trackpad, keyboard shortcuts, and media playback, making it perfect for presentations, remote desktop control, or browsing while lounging on the couch. Simply install the companion app on both devices to pair them. It is a convenient and cost-effective alternative to buying a dedicated remote or trackpad, especially handy for Mac users who always have their iPhone nearby. The setup is quick and the experience is smooth.

items.title: CentryAI
items.description: Subscription tracker built by someone who forgot 11 of them
items.summary_zh: CentryAI是一个订阅管理工具，由一位曾忘记取消11个订阅的开发者创建，充满了真实痛点。它能自动扫描你的账户，检测所有循环扣费项目，并以简洁的仪表盘呈现，还会在扣费前发送提醒。用户只需一次点击就能取消不需要的订阅。对于被流媒体、软件会员等众多月度支出淹没的人来说，CentryAI是省钱利器，帮你轻松掌握每一笔开销，不再糊里糊涂地付费。
items.summary_en: CentryAI is a subscription tracker created by a developer who once forgot to cancel 11 subscriptions, making it a tool born from real pain. It automatically scans your accounts to detect recurring charges, organizes them in a clean dashboard, and sends reminders before payments. With a single tap, you can cancel unwanted subscriptions. It is a lifesaver for anyone drowning in monthly expenses from streaming services, software, gym memberships, and more. The personal story behind it adds relatability, and it solves the common problem of losing money to forgotten subscriptions, giving you full control over your recurring costs.

items.title: Termi Protocol
items.description: Watch your AI coding agents build, live in 3D

items.title: 基于Redis的分布式锁优化实践：从Redlock到自适应自旋的实现与思考
items.description: 摘要 在微服务架构下，分布式锁是解决数据最终一致性的关键组件。本文深入剖析了传统Redis分布式锁在高并发场景下的痛点，提出了一种结合看门狗（Watch Dog）续期、等待队列与自适应自旋的增强型锁实
items.summary_zh: 在微服务架构中，分布式锁是保证数据最终一致性的关键，但传统Redis锁在高并发下常面临性能瓶颈和可靠性问题。本文深入剖析了这些痛点，并提出了一种增强型锁实现：在看门狗（Watch Dog）自动续期机制基础上引入等待队列和自适应自旋策略，显著减少了锁冲突时的资源浪费和延迟。对于后端架构师和中间件开发者来说，这篇文章从Redlock的局限性出发，一步步推导出更鲁棒的优化方案，兼具理论深度与实践价值。
items.summary_en: This article tackles the high-concurrency challenges of Redis-based distributed locks in microservice architectures. It first analyzes the shortcomings of traditional Redlock, such as lock contention overhead and unreliable renewal. Then it presents an enhanced implementation that combines a watchdog mechanism for automatic lease renewal with a waiting queue and adaptive spinning. The adaptive spinning dynamically adjusts spin time based on lock acquisition probability, reducing CPU waste while keeping latency low. For backend architects and middleware engineers, the article offers a clear progression from established patterns to a more robust solution, balancing theoretical analysis with practical code examples. The result is a distributed lock that is both more efficient and more resilient under heavy load.

items.title: 小程序上线半年我赚了多少钱？
items.description: 1. 开发历程 时间过得真快，转眼间福猪记账小程序上线已经有半年时间了，从v1.0.0 版本做到了 v1.6.1 版本。今天整理了开发日志，真的不敢相信自己在工作之余能够把它做出来并上线。 2.用户积
items.summary_zh: 一位独立开发者分享了他业余开发的记账小程序“福猪记账”上线半年来的真实收入与运营数据。从v1.0.0迭代到v1.6.1，他记录了开发日志、用户增长曲线和盈利情况。这篇文章不仅展示了个人开发者利用业余时间做产品的可能性，也提供了从零到一、从技术到商业的完整复盘，特别适合想试试副业的程序员参考。
items.summary_en: An indie developer shared the real revenue and operational data of his expense tracking mini-program called 'Fuzhu' over six months since launch. He iterated from v1.0.0 to v1.6.1, documenting development logs, user growth, and profitability. This article demonstrates the possibility of building a product in spare time, offering a complete postmortem from coding to business. It’s especially useful for programmers exploring side projects.

items.title: Cursor 转 Codex 大半个月，聊聊我的真实感受
items.description: Cursor 让我第一次强烈感受到 AI 编程的震撼，Codex 则让我第一次真正感觉到，AI 不只是编程助手，而是一个真正的超级Agent，Codex 明显更接近下一阶段的形态。
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者从Cursor切换到Amazon Codex使用了半个多月，分享了两者的本质差异。Cursor让他第一次感受到AI编程的震撼，但Codex让他真正觉得AI不再只是辅助工具，而是一个能独立执行任务的超级Agent。作者认为Codex更接近下一阶段AI编程的形态，从对话式补全进化到主动式代理，对追求最前沿编程体验的开发者有重要参考价值。
items.summary_en: After switching from Cursor to Amazon Codex for over half a month, a developer shared their real experience of the fundamental differences. While Cursor first impressed them with AI-assisted coding, Codex felt like a true super agent that can independently execute tasks, not just an assistant. The author believes Codex represents the next phase of AI programming—evolving from conversational completion to proactive agency. This comparison is invaluable for developers seeking the cutting edge in AI-powered coding tools.

items.title: 面试官问你：“AI 能写 80% 的代码了，公司为什么还需要你？”
items.description: 先说一个事实：2026 年的技术面试，已经和两年前完全不一样了。两年前面试问的是："手写一个 Promise"、"说说 React Fiber 原理"...现在面试官默认你会用 AI。他们真正想知道的
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在AI能写出80%代码的背景下，技术面试如何从考察基础原理转向考察程序员的独特价值。面试官默认你熟悉AI工具，他们更看重问题拆解、业务理解、架构思维和人机协作能力，提醒开发者要聚焦AI无法替代的核心竞争力。
items.summary_en: The article explores how technical interviews have transformed as AI now writes 80% of the code. Interviewers assume proficiency with AI tools and instead evaluate skills that make developers irreplaceable: problem decomposition, business understanding, architectural thinking, and effective human-AI collaboration. It cautions against over-reliance on AI-generated code and urges developers to cultivate uniquely human competencies for long-term career relevance.

items.title: 我用AI做了个微信小游戏-上线了
items.description: 真实的 AI 开发微信小游戏全流程记录：技术栈、prompt、踩坑清单、成本明细全公开。文末有彩蛋。
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章完整记录了一位开发者利用AI辅助技术从零构建并上线微信小游戏的全过程。作者毫无保留地公开了技术栈、提示词（prompt）设计、遇到的各类踩坑问题以及详细的成本明细，甚至附有彩蛋。对于想尝试用AI加速小游戏开发但又缺乏经验的团队或个人来说，这篇实战复盘提供了真实可参考的路线图和避坑指南，展现了AI在降低开发门槛方面的巨大潜力。
items.summary_en: This article provides a comprehensive walkthrough of building and launching a WeChat mini game entirely with AI assistance. The author shares everything from the technology stack and prompt engineering techniques to a detailed breakdown of costs and a list of common pitfalls encountered during the process, ending with a hidden bonus. For indie developers or small teams curious about leveraging AI to speed up game development, this real-world case study serves as an invaluable reference. It demonstrates how AI tools can dramatically lower the barrier to entry for game creation, making it accessible even to those without a deep coding background.

items.title: 面试官：“你连Claude Code都没用过吗？”，我怼回去：“就没用过又怎么了？”
items.description: 现在提起AI编程工具，Claude Code绝对是大家心目中的首选。甚至在面试当中，一句“你有没有用过Claude Code？”，已然成为衡量你技术敏感度的‘试金石’。！今天给大家分享下它的实战玩法！
items.summary_zh: 文章以面试中被问及Claude Code使用经历的场景为引子，作者起初对面试官的质疑表示不满，但随后分享了自己实际使用Claude Code的实战玩法。文中详细介绍了Claude Code在代码生成、调试和重构中的高效表现，强调了掌握AI编程工具正在成为技术敏感度的新标尺。对于求职者和开发者而言，这不仅是工具推荐，更是职业发展的提醒。
items.summary_en: The article starts with a job interview where the candidate is asked about Claude Code experience, initially feeling defensive. But then the author shares practical tips on using Claude Code for code generation, debugging, and refactoring, highlighting how proficiency in AI coding tools is becoming a benchmark for technical savvy. For job seekers and developers, it's not just a tool recommendation but a wake-up call for career growth.

items.title: 🚀 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 十大热门项目排行榜 🔥
items.description: 欢迎来到 2026 年 6 月 GitHub 热门开源项目排行榜！聚焦 Agent 感知 + 技能市场 + 视频生产 + 代码智能 + 并行编排五大主线！
items.summary_zh: 文章盘点了2026年6月GitHub上最热门的十大开源项目，聚焦五大技术主线：Agent感知、技能市场、视频生产、代码智能和并行编排。这些项目反映了当前AI和开发者工具领域的最新趋势，例如自主智能体框架、去中心化技能交易平台、AI视频生成工具、代码补全与审查增强插件，以及并行计算调度方案。对于希望紧跟开源前沿的开发者，这篇榜单提供了一份值得关注的项目清单。
items.summary_en: This article highlights the top ten trending open source projects on GitHub in June 2026, organized around five key themes: agent perception, skill marketplaces, video production, code intelligence, and parallel orchestration. The projects showcase cutting-edge developments in AI agents, decentralized skill trading platforms, AI-powered video generation, smart code completion and review tools, and high-performance parallel scheduling frameworks. For developers who want to stay ahead of the open source curve, this curated list offers a valuable snapshot of where the ecosystem is heading.

items.title: 写给年轻程序员的几点建议-2
items.description: 现在互联网红利已经消失了，深知年轻程序员的不易，下面就浅薄地谈几点建议。中国人口基数比较大，要培养自己的 商业嗅觉。你能卖爆一个商品，就能获得巨大的财富。微信公众号如果能写出 几万 浏览量的文章，就有
items.summary_zh: 作者针对互联网红利消退的现状，向年轻程序员提出培养商业嗅觉和写作能力的建议。他认为在中国庞大的人口基数下，能卖爆一个商品或写出高阅读量的公众号文章就能获得巨大财富。文章强调技术之外的市场认知和内容表达能力同样重要，适合处于职业早期的程序员思考如何拓宽收入来源。
items.summary_en: The author offers advice for young programmers in the post-internet-bonus era, emphasizing the need to develop business acumen and writing skills. Given China's huge population, successfully selling a product or writing a viral WeChat article can bring significant wealth. The article argues that market insight and content communication are as crucial as technical skills, making it relevant for early-career programmers looking to diversify their income streams.

items.title: DeepSeek正式官宣摇人，夯！
items.description: 话说 DeepSeek 这次真的是破天荒了。 自 2023 年正式创立以来，三年了，你啥时候见过这个公司专门大张旗鼓发公告招过人。 但是就在前几天，DeepSeek 直接丢出王炸，正式官宣大规模摇人，
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek自2023年创立以来首次正式发布大规模招聘公告，打破了此前低调、不主动招人的传统。这一动作表明DeepSeek正在加速扩张，可能为应对更激烈的AI竞争和业务增长做准备。对求职者而言，进入这家以技术见长的初创公司意味着参与前沿大模型研发的机会。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, the AI startup founded in 2023, has for the first time publicly announced a large-scale recruitment drive, marking a significant shift from its previous low-key hiring approach. This move signals rapid expansion, likely to fuel growth and compete in the increasingly crowded AI landscape. For job seekers, it represents a rare opportunity to join a company known for its strong technical focus and work on cutting-edge large language models, making it a notable event in the Chinese AI talent market.

items.title: 我用 Codex 重写了同事维护三年的代码，他没说谢谢——而是找了领导
items.description: 我用 Codex 花一个周末重写了同事维护三年的代码，提了一个大 PR。他没有说谢谢，而是找了领导。这篇文章复盘了我在 AI 时代犯的一个典型错误：技术上正确不等于做法正确。
items.summary_zh: 作者用OpenAI的Codex花一个周末重写了同事维护三年的代码，提了个大PR，结果同事没有感谢，反而直接去找了领导。这篇文章反思了在AI时代一个典型错误：技术上正确不等于做法正确。它提醒我们，在团队协作中，技术决策不仅要考虑效率，更要尊重他人劳动和历史积累，避免因技术优越感伤害人际关系。对于技术管理者或开发者而言，这不仅是代码重写的问题，更是关于如何平衡创新与团队协作的深刻教训。
items.summary_en: The author used OpenAI's Codex to rewrite a colleague's three-year-old codebase in a single weekend and submitted a massive pull request. Instead of gratitude, the colleague reported the matter to their manager. This piece reflects on a typical mistake in the AI era: being technically right doesn't mean being procedurally right. It underscores the importance of respecting team dynamics and historical contributions, even when wielding powerful new tools. The story is a cautionary tale for developers and tech leads about the delicate balance between innovation and collaboration, showing how technical superiority can backfire if not handled with empathy and communication.

items.title: 如何看待华为首批天才少年计划入选者李博杰吐槽 DeepSeek 的面试流程拖沓，被面试官指控抄袭？
items.summary_zh: 华为首批天才少年计划成员李博杰在知乎发文吐槽DeepSeek的面试流程极度拖沓，并声称被面试官当场指控其项目存在抄袭嫌疑，引发热议。这一事件折射出当前AI人才激烈争夺背景下，企业与候选人在招聘沟通、专业评价标准上的断层。李博杰的背景光环与DeepSeek的审慎态度形成鲜明对比，话题迅速点燃了关于技术大佬是否应被宽容对待以及面试流程公平性的讨论。无论是求职者还是招聘方，都能从这场口水仗中反思如何优化招聘体验。
items.summary_en: Li Bojie, an early member of Huawei's prestigious Genius Young Program, publicly criticized DeepSeek's interview process as unbearably slow and revealed that an interviewer accused his work of plagiarism. The incident ignited a heated debate on Zhihu about the tension between elite talent and rigorous hiring procedures in the competitive AI field. Li's prominent background contrasted sharply with DeepSeek's cautious approach, leading to discussions on whether star engineers deserve relaxed vetting and how to ensure fairness in interviews. For both job seekers and recruiters, the controversy highlights the need to balance thorough evaluation with respect for candidates' time and past achievements. It also raises questions about how companies verify originality during technical interviews.

items.title: 99 万机器人伴侣续航仅 2-4 小时，为啥续航这么差​？技术核心卡点在哪？可能对用户体验有哪些影响？
items.summary_zh: 售价高达99万的机器人伴侣续航却仅有2到4小时，这一缺陷成为知乎热议话题。核心技术瓶颈在于内置电池的能量密度无法支持人形机器人全身关节运动、传感器运算和AI交互的高功耗。此外，为保持美观和便携，机身空间限制进一步压缩了电池容量。如此短的续航将严重影响用户体验——用户无法享受全天候陪伴，频繁充电也会破坏沉浸感，更可能让这个昂贵的设备沦为一个“高级摆件”。解决续航问题需要电池材料或低功耗AI芯片的根本性突破。
items.summary_en: A robot companion priced at 990,000 yuan (about $140,000) can only run for two to four hours on a single charge, sparking intense discussion on Zhihu. The core technical bottleneck lies in the energy density of current batteries, which cannot sustain the power-hungry combination of full-body actuators, onboard sensors, and real-time AI processing. Additionally, the sleek, humanoid form factor leaves little room for larger battery packs. This short battery life severely undermines the user experience: owners cannot enjoy continuous companionship, frequent recharging breaks the illusion of a sentient partner, and the value of such an expensive device is drastically diminished. Many commenters joke it becomes an overpriced static figurine. Solving this will require breakthroughs in battery chemistry or ultra-low-power AI chips.

items.title: 为什么有人说 React 和 Vue 可能是最后的前端框架了？
items.summary_zh: 有人认为React和Vue可能是最后的前端框架，因为Web平台标准化和浏览器原生能力越来越强，比如Web Components可直接实现组件化，无需框架。加上工具链成熟后，开发者更关注业务而非框架本身。但框架仍有价值：它解决了状态管理、路由等复杂问题，提供一致开发体验。真正意义上的“最后”可能不会出现，因为技术永远会进化，但趋势是轻量、标准化。
items.summary_en: Some argue that React and Vue might be the last major frontend frameworks, thanks to the growing standardization of web platforms and native browser capabilities like Web Components. Developers are shifting focus from framework churn to business logic. However, frameworks still excel at solving complex issues like state management and routing, offering a coherent development experience. The notion of 'last' is likely exaggerated—technologies always evolve—but we are moving toward lighter, more standardized approaches. This matters because it suggests future frontend work may rely less on heavy frameworks and more on native APIs, reducing learning curves and maintenance costs.

items.title: AI 时代，以后是不是人人都可以是一人公司？
AI 能取代科研人员吗？
中国企业出手，欧洲爽了
items.summary_zh: 文章讲述了中国企业近期在欧洲的一系列投资与并购动作，让欧洲市场感到振奋。从新能源到高端制造，中国资本正以更加积极的姿态参与欧洲产业升级，为当地带来就业和技术合作机会。这种双向奔赴不仅帮助中国企业拓展全球布局，也让欧洲在低迷经济中找到了新的增长引擎，实现了真正的互利共赢。
items.summary_en: The article discusses how recent investments and acquisitions by Chinese companies in Europe have buoyed the European economy. From renewable energy to high-end manufacturing, Chinese capital is actively participating in Europe's industrial upgrade, creating jobs and fostering tech collaboration. This two-way engagement not only helps Chinese firms expand globally but also gives Europe a much-needed growth engine amid economic sluggishness, embodying a genuine win-win partnership.

items.title: 8点1氪丨SK海力士本周五将登陆纳斯达克；99万机器人“伴侣”续航撑不过一晚？优必选回应；青海省博物馆回应“国家一级文物发现TCL字样”
items.summary_zh: 本期8点1氪报道了SK海力士本周五将在纳斯达克上市的消息，标志着韩国半导体巨头加速全球化资本布局；同时针对优必选99万元机器人伴侣实际续航不足一晚的质疑进行了官方回应；另外青海省博物馆就国家一级文物被发现印有TCL字样一事做出说明，引发文物真伪与修复规范的讨论。这些新闻分别从科技、消费和文保领域反映了当下的热点与争议。
items.summary_en: This edition of 8点1氪 covers three major stories: SK Hynix's Nasdaq listing this Friday, signaling the Korean semiconductor giant's push for global capital markets; Ubtech's official response to claims that its 990,000-yuan robot companion cannot last a single night on battery; and the Qinghai Provincial Museum's explanation about a national first-class artifact that was found bearing the TCL logo, sparking debate over authenticity and restoration standards. These headlines capture the latest controversies in tech, consumer goods, and cultural heritage.

items.title: 1999元的AI戒指，能干掉你的键盘吗？
items.summary_zh: 这款售价1999元的AI戒指试图挑战传统键盘输入方式，它通过手势识别和触控反馈，让用户在不接触物理键盘的情况下完成打字和操控。虽然概念前卫，但实际体验中识别准确率和输入速度仍远不及键盘，更多是作为智能穿戴的延伸和炫酷交互的尝试。对于极客和追求新鲜感的人来说值得一试，但短期内还无法真正替代键盘的生产力地位。
items.summary_en: This 1,999-yuan AI ring aims to replace your keyboard by enabling text input and device control through gesture recognition and haptic feedback. While the concept is futuristic, real-world tests show its accuracy and typing speed still lag far behind a physical keyboard. It shines more as a novel wearable extension for geeks and early adopters seeking cool interactions, but it won't dethrone the keyboard for serious productivity anytime soon. The question remains: can a ring truly kill your keyboard, or is it just a stylish novelty?

items.title: 小米的“巧实力”快用完了
items.summary_zh: 小米近年来依靠供应链整合和性价比策略迅速扩张，但这种“巧实力”正在面临瓶颈。随着竞争对手在高端市场和技术研发上的持续投入，小米原先的性价比优势逐渐被稀释，同时其在核心芯片和操作系统等底层技术上的短板日益凸显。文章分析指出，小米若不能尽快补齐技术短板并建立真正的差异化竞争力，其增长动能将难以为继，这对于关注中国科技公司战略转型的读者具有重要启示。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi has rapidly expanded by leveraging its supply chain integration and cost-effective strategy, often described as 'smart power.' However, this approach is running out of steam as rivals invest heavily in premium segments and core technologies. The article argues that Xiaomi's lack of proprietary chips and operating systems is becoming a critical weakness. Without building real differentiation through deep tech innovation, its growth may stall. This analysis is crucial for anyone tracking how Chinese tech giants navigate the shift from marketing-led growth to fundamental R&D competition.

items.title: 刚刚，Claude 的「潜意识」曝光了
大厂AI，转入“基因驱动”
全面涨价、最惨泄密，苹果新CEO地狱开局：用16款新品突围？
刚刚，Anthropic发现Claude「类意识工作台」，神秘J空间藏着没说出口的想法
告别健身房的都市年轻人，周末都藏在山里溯溪
items.summary_zh: 越来越多的都市年轻人正在告别传统的健身房，选择在周末走进山林，参与溯溪这项户外运动。他们沿着溪流逆流而上，在自然中完成全身锻炼，同时享受清凉和放松。这种趋势反映了现代人对健康生活方式的重新定义——既要高效锻炼，又要远离城市喧嚣、亲近自然。溯溪不仅考验体能和协调性，还能在团队协作中增进友谊。对于长期久坐、压力大的上班族来说，这是一种比健身房更有趣、更有挑战性的替代方案。
items.summary_en: A growing number of urban young professionals are ditching traditional gyms and heading to the mountains on weekends for stream hiking—a full-body workout that involves walking against the current in natural streams. This trend reflects a shift in how people view fitness: they want efficient exercise combined with an escape from city life, seeking both physical challenge and mental relaxation. Stream hiking offers team bonding, fun, and a way to reconnect with nature. For sedentary office workers, it's an exciting alternative to monotonous gym routines, promising adventure and real-world camaraderie.

items.title: 脑子灵活的人，心里都藏着一条人生作弊法
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了那些思维敏捷、善于解决问题的人是如何利用一套隐性策略来在生活和工作中取得优势的。所谓“人生作弊法”，并非真正的欺骗，而是一种高效的思维框架——比如学会复盘、善用类比、培养跨界联想能力等。这些方法能帮助人们快速抓住问题本质、从不同角度找到解决方案，从而在竞争中脱颖而出。对于渴望提升认知水平、突破瓶颈的读者来说，掌握这样的思维工具，就像在人生游戏中获得了一张“加速卡”。
items.summary_en: This article explores how sharp-minded people secretly use a 'life cheat code'—not actual cheating, but a set of mental frameworks that give them an edge. These include practices like regular reflection, analogical thinking, and cross-disciplinary connection. Such strategies help them quickly grasp the essence of problems and find creative solutions. For anyone looking to boost their cognitive abilities and break through personal plateaus, adopting these tools is like unlocking a speed boost in the game of life, enabling faster learning and better decision-making.

items.title: “倒贴99元替别人遛狗”，年轻人捧红这门赔本生意
Gemini 3.5 Pro绝密泄露，前端赶超Fable 5
科技大厂，又有4800人没工作了

豆包千问下架“智能体”？翻译闹乌龙，Agent其实是大厂重中之重
混元3正式版拿了高分，腾讯全家桶可以放心用了
前大疆员工做了款消费级纺织机，拿下红杉、顺为、米哈游等数亿融资｜产品观察
Elastic 开源了基于认知科学的 Atlas Agent Memory
Java 近期新闻：Hardwood 1.0、Endive 1.0、Azul Payara、Quarkus、WildFly、LangChain4j、OSSI
items.summary_zh: Java生态迎来多项重要更新，包括Hardwood 1.0、Endive 1.0、Azul Payara、Quarkus、WildFly、LangChain4j和OSSI等项目的发布或版本升级。这些进展涵盖了框架、工具、运行时和AI集成，体现了Java社区持续创新的活力，为开发者带来了更多选择。
items.summary_en: The Java ecosystem has seen a flurry of significant updates, including the release or version upgrades of Hardwood 1.0, Endive 1.0, Azul Payara, Quarkus, WildFly, LangChain4j, and OSSI. These developments span frameworks, tools, runtimes, and AI integration, reflecting the ongoing innovation vitality of the Java community and providing developers with more choices.

items.title: 1.5亿数据！蚂蚁灵波发布空间感知模型LingBot-Depth 2.0，看得更懂、更准
items.summary_zh: 蚂蚁灵波发布了LingBot-Depth 2.0空间感知模型，基于1.5亿数据训练，在深度估计的准确性和理解能力上取得大幅提升。该模型能让机器“看得更懂、更准”，对机器人导航、三维重建和AR/VR等依赖精确空间感知的行业有重要价值。
items.summary_en: Ant LingBot has released LingBot-Depth 2.0, a spatial perception model trained on 150 million data points, achieving significant improvements in depth estimation accuracy and understanding. The model enables machines to 'see more intelligently and precisely,' making it highly valuable for industries that rely on accurate spatial perception, such as robot navigation, 3D reconstruction, and AR/VR.

items.title: 亚马逊云科技发布用于成本分析和优化的 FinOps Agent 预览版
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊云科技推出了FinOps Agent的预览版，这是一个专门用于成本分析和优化的工具，能自动监控云资源使用并提供优化建议。它帮助企业和财务团队实时洞察云支出，降低浪费，对希望有效管理云成本的组织极具吸引力。
items.summary_en: Amazon Web Services has launched a preview of FinOps Agent, a dedicated tool for cost analysis and optimization that automatically monitors cloud resource usage and provides optimization recommendations. It helps enterprises and finance teams gain real-time insights into cloud spending while reducing waste, making it highly attractive for organizations looking to manage cloud costs effectively.

items.title: Swift 6.4 带来了新的语言特性以及 Swift 与 XCTest 之间的互操作性
items.summary_zh: Swift 6.4正式发布，带来了多项新语言特性，并大幅改善了Swift与XCTest之间的互操作性，让开发者能更流畅地编写和运行测试。这次更新旨在提升Swift在服务器端和跨平台开发中的测试体验，对追求代码质量和开发效率的团队是重大利好。
items.summary_en: Swift 6.4 has been released with several new language features and greatly improved interoperability between Swift and XCTest, allowing developers to write and run tests more smoothly. This update aims to enhance the testing experience in server-side and cross-platform development, making it a significant boon for teams focused on code quality and development efficiency.

items.title: 世界模型炒作了半年，反应速度还不如 VLA？穆尧团队和百度智能云给出最新解法
items.summary_zh: 世界模型炒作了半年，但在反应速度上仍不如VLA（视觉-语言-动作模型）。穆尧团队携手百度智能云提出了新解法，通过优化架构和训练策略显著提升实时性，解决了世界模型落地时“想得多但动得慢”的痛点，对机器人、自动驾驶等需要快速决策的场景意义重大。
items.summary_en: After half a year of hype, world models still lag behind VLA (vision-language-action models) in response speed. The Mu Yao team and Baidu Intelligent Cloud have proposed a new solution that significantly improves real-time performance through optimized architecture and training strategies, addressing the key bottleneck of 'thinking too much but acting too slowly' in world model deployment. This breakthrough is crucial for robotics, autonomous driving, and other scenarios requiring rapid decision-making.

items.title: 硬件原生FP8加持，摩尔线程完成美团LongCat-2.0 Day-0 极速适配
items.summary_zh: 摩尔线程的GPU凭借硬件原生FP8精度支持，快速适配了美团的LongCat-2.0模型，实现了Day-0极速部署。这意味着国产AI芯片在大模型推理效率上迈出了关键一步，能显著降低推理成本和延迟。对美团等互联网公司而言，使用国产硬件加速推荐和搜索系统将更加可行。
items.summary_en: Moore Threads' GPU, with native FP8 precision support, quickly adapted to Meituan's LongCat-2.0 model, achieving Day-0 rapid deployment. This marks a key step for domestic AI chips in large model inference efficiency, significantly reducing inference cost and latency. For internet companies like Meituan, leveraging domestic hardware to accelerate recommendation and search systems becomes more feasible.

items.title: Linus 再谈 AI：大模型能写 Demo，但对复杂系统要有敬畏之心
items.summary_zh: Linus Torvalds 近日在访谈中再次谈及人工智能，他认为大语言模型确实能够快速编写一些简单的演示程序，但面对真正复杂的系统时，开发者必须保持敬畏之心。这一观点提醒我们不要盲目依赖AI，尤其是在涉及底层架构和关键逻辑的领域，人类工程师的深度思考和全局把控依然不可替代。
items.summary_en: Linus Torvalds recently shared his thoughts on AI, acknowledging that large language models can quickly generate simple demo code. However, he emphasized that developers must remain humble and cautious when dealing with complex systems. His remarks serve as a timely reminder that while AI can boost productivity, it cannot replace the deep understanding and holistic judgment required for critical software engineering, especially in areas like kernel development where mistakes have far-reaching consequences.

items.title: Agentic 范式下的视频画质优化：火山引擎的新路径
items.summary_zh: 火山引擎提出了Agentic范式下的视频画质优化新路径，即利用AI智能体自主感知和调整画质参数。这种方法比传统规则更灵活，能应对复杂的场景变化，提升用户观看体验。对于视频平台和直播服务商，该技术有望降低人工调优成本并提高画质一致性。
items.summary_en: Volcengine introduced a new approach to video quality optimization under the Agentic paradigm, using AI agents to autonomously perceive and adjust quality parameters. This method is more flexible than traditional rules, handling complex scene changes and improving user viewing experience. For video platforms and live streaming services, this technology promises to reduce manual tuning costs while enhancing quality consistency.

items.title: 腾讯混元Hy3正式发布，元宝同步上线Hy3 Agent能力、免费开放
items.summary_zh: 腾讯正式发布混元Hy3大模型，并同步在元宝应用中上线Hy3 Agent能力，向用户免费开放。这款模型在推理、创作和多模态理解上大幅提升，能够辅助用户完成复杂任务如代码生成、文档分析和创意设计。对开发者、创作者和普通用户而言，降低了AI使用门槛，使人机协作更加自然高效。
items.summary_en: Tencent officially launched its Hunyuan Hy3 large language model, along with a free Hy3 Agent feature in its Yuanbao app. The model significantly improves reasoning, creativity, and multimodal understanding, enabling complex tasks like code generation, document analysis, and creative design. It lowers the barrier to AI for developers, creators, and everyday users, making human-AI collaboration smoother and more efficient.

items.title: 亚马逊云科技推出 Workload Credentials Provider，用于自动化证书和密钥管理
“我一行代码都没读就发布了”，被OpenAI收购后，uv工具创始人开始反思AI编程
items.summary_zh: 被OpenAI收购后，uv工具创始人反思AI编程并坦言“一行代码都没读就发布了”。这位开发者回顾了快速迭代中的教训：过度依赖AI生成代码可能导致理解鸿沟和产品质量下降。他认为AI编程工具应当辅助而非替代人类判断，强调代码审查和领域知识的重要性，给追求速度的开发者们敲响了警钟。
items.summary_en: After his tool uv was acquired by OpenAI, its founder reflected on AI-assisted coding, admitting he 'didn't read a single line before releasing.' He shared lessons from rapid iteration: over-reliance on AI-generated code risks creating understanding gaps and quality issues. He argued that AI coding tools should augment, not replace, human judgment, emphasizing code review and domain expertise—a timely warning for developers chasing speed.

items.title: GTLC 杭州站回顾｜AI 创业进入深水区，技术领导者都在关注什么？
Java 近期新闻：Spring Tools、Helidon、Open Liberty、TomEE、JobRunr、Hibernate、Commonhaus 基金会
items.summary_zh: 本周Java生态迎来多项更新：Spring Tools 改进IDE体验，Helidon 发布新版本增强微服务能力，Open Liberty 和 TomEE 分别优化了企业级支持，JobRunr 简化了任务调度，Hibernate 修复了关键问题，Commonhaus 基金会也在持续推动开源治理。这些变化共同反映了Java社区在开发效率、云原生和企业级应用方面的持续演进。
items.summary_en: This week's Java news brings a flurry of updates across the ecosystem: Spring Tools enhances IDE productivity, Helidon rolls out new microservices features, Open Liberty and TomEE improve enterprise support, JobRunr refines job scheduling, Hibernate fixes critical bugs, and the Commonhaus foundation advances open governance. These developments showcase the Java community's steady progress in developer experience, cloud-native readiness, and enterprise stability, benefiting everyone from individual developers to large-scale deployments.

items.title: Anthropic：Claude 已承担 95% 的内部数据分析查询工作
items.summary_zh: Anthropic透露其内部数据分析查询已有95%由Claude完成。团队将SQL、Python查询和报表生成等任务交给Claude，显著提升了效率并减少了人工错误。这一实践表明，大型语言模型在企业数据工作流中已从辅助走向主力，为其他公司在数据分析领域部署AI提供了可行范例和信心。
items.summary_en: Anthropic revealed that Claude now handles 95% of its internal data analysis queries, including SQL and Python queries and report generation. This shift has sharply improved efficiency and reduced human errors. The example demonstrates how large language models have evolved from assistants to primary workers in enterprise data workflows, offering a replicable model for other companies to deploy AI in analytics.

items.title: 73% PR 由AI生成！Claude Code之父对话Spotify：2900名工程师每天部署4500次，坐地铁都能提交代码
items.summary_zh: 在近期的一次对话中，Claude Code的创始人透露惊人数据：目前已有73%的代码合并请求由AI生成。与此同时，Spotify的2900名工程师每天能进行4500次部署，甚至有人在通勤的地铁上也能提交代码。这种高度自动化和低门槛的协作模式，正彻底改变软件开发流程。AI不仅帮助开发者写代码、生成PR，还加速了从构思到上线的整个周期。对于追求敏捷交付的团队来说，这既是效率的革命，也带来了代码质量和安全的新挑战。
items.summary_en: In a recent conversation, the creator of Claude Code revealed that 73% of pull requests are now generated by AI. Meanwhile, Spotify's 2,900 engineers perform 4,500 deployments daily, with some even submitting code while commuting on the subway. This extreme automation and low-friction collaboration are transforming software development. AI not only helps write code and create PRs but accelerates the entire cycle from idea to production. For teams chasing agility, it's a productivity revolution—but it also introduces new challenges around code quality, review, and security.

items.title: 豆包、千问关停智能体功能；曝腾讯研发token额度1400元/月起步，有人过万；美团限豆包、阿里禁Claude Code｜AI周报
items.summary_zh: 本周AI领域迎来多项重要动态：字节跳动的豆包和阿里通义千问相继关停了各自的智能体功能，引发市场对AI应用策略转向的猜测。与此同时，据透露腾讯正在研发的AI token额度定价曝光，每月1400元起步，部分重度用户月消费过万。在工具使用政策上，美团限制内部使用豆包，而阿里明确禁止使用Claude Code。这些消息反映出大模型服务收费化、企业管控收紧的趋势，对开发者和企业用户都将产生深远影响。
items.summary_en: This week's AI roundup covers major shifts: ByteDance's Doubao and Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen have shut down their AI agent features, signaling a possible pivot in strategy. Separately, reports reveal that Tencent's upcoming AI token pricing starts at 1,400 yuan per month, with heavy users spending over 10,000 yuan. Meanwhile, Meituan has restricted internal use of Doubao, and Alibaba has banned Claude Code. These developments underscore a trend toward monetization of large language models and tighter corporate governance, impacting both developers and enterprise users who rely on these AI tools.

items.title: 让 Agent 成为音视频工作台：AI MediaKit CLI + Skill 发布
items.summary_zh: AI MediaKit CLI与Skill发布，让Agent变身音视频工作台。这套工具允许开发者通过命令行和可扩展技能模块，轻松调用AI完成音视频剪辑、转码、字幕生成等任务，无需手动操作专业软件。它解决了多媒体处理流程中重复劳动多的痛点，尤其适合内容创作者和自动化运维场景。
items.summary_en: The release of AI MediaKit CLI and Skill transforms an agent into an audio/video workstation. This toolkit allows developers to use command-line interfaces and extensible skill modules to perform tasks like video editing, transcoding, and subtitle generation without manual software operations. It addresses the pain point of repetitive multimedia workflows, benefiting content creators and automation engineers alike.

items.title: 数亿元融资落地！光象科技自研物理原生基座模型，跳出 VLA 与世界模型路线
items.summary_zh: 光象科技近日宣布完成数亿元人民币融资，并发布了一款自研的物理原生基座模型。与传统大模型依赖视觉-语言-动作（VLA）或世界模型不同，该模型直接从物理原理出发构建底层架构，旨在更准确地理解和模拟真实世界的物理规律。这种创新路线有望在机器人控制、自动驾驶、工业仿真等高精度场景中发挥关键作用。对于需要模型具备真实物理理解能力的研发团队，光象科技提供了区别于主流路线的另一种选择，展示了AI基础研究的新方向。
items.summary_en: Guangxiang Technology has secured hundreds of millions of yuan in funding and unveiled a self-developed physics-native foundation model. Unlike mainstream approaches like VLA (vision-language-action) or world models, this model builds its architecture directly from physical principles, aiming to simulate real-world physics more accurately. This innovative route could be a game-changer for robotics control, autonomous driving, and industrial simulation—domains requiring precise physical understanding. By offering an alternative to the dominant paradigms, Guangxiang highlights a fresh direction in AI fundamental research, promising more robust and reliable performance in complex physical environments.
